prompt: DevBoss scheduled eval: agenda-first Todoist tasking; check GH CLI access for bloonbladmaker/tdrrecherche/Schoolanalyse and run the first safe local cross-repo eval on tdrrecherche.
commands_or_evidence: Todoist active-task poll via Composio: 7 DevBoss-relevant active tasks; selected high-priority GH CLI access checks and tdrrecherche local eval.
gh repo view tiddeman83/bloonbladmaker, tiddeman83/tdrrecherche, tiddeman83/Schoolanalyse -> GraphQL Could not resolve to a Repository for all three slugs.
Local availability: /opt/data/repos/tdrrecherche and /opt/data/worktrees/tdrrecherche/feat-complete-wordpress-design-samples exist; bloonbladmaker and Schoolanalyse local repo dirs missing.
tdrrecherche git status --short -> clean; branch feat/complete-wordpress-design-samples; HEAD bde99b7 docs: capture project handoff state; git ls-files -> 58.
php -v -> command not found; node --version -> v22.22.3.

HTML/asset parser over index.html + prototypes/variant-a..e: no duplicate IDs and no missing relative assets; found prototype form blockers: bad action on all 10 static forms and unlabeled controls in A-D/sampler.
node --check on wordpress-theme/tdr-recherche/assets/js/theme.js and extracted inline scripts -> rc 0 for all checked scripts.
python3 -m http.server 4173 + urllib smoke -> 200 for /, /prototypes/variant-a/, /prototypes/variant-e/, and /wordpress-theme/tdr-recherche/assets/js/theme.js.
Credential pattern scan for GitHub/Todoist/API/private-key patterns -> 0 matches.
gh copilot --help -> rc 0; wrapper available, but no code-producing review invoked for read-only eval/no diff.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: DevBoss Todoist cards are used as source tasking.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Composio TODOIST_GET_ALL_TASKS returned active DevBoss cards including GH CLI access checks and local tdrrecherche eval.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Repo state and memory discovery are recorded.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: No .end-to-end-loop memory existed in either tdrrecherche checkout; local worktree clean at bde99b7 on feat/complete-wordpress-design-samples.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: One realistic read-only scenario is executed with real commands.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Ran GH access checks, HTML/asset audit, JS syntax checks, local HTTP smoke, credential scan, and WordPress/PHP readiness probes.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GitHub/Copilot availability is assessed without unsafe fallback.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: gh is authenticated as tiddeman83, but exact slugs do not resolve through gh repo view; gh copilot wrapper help returns rc 0. No old per-repo key was used.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Production readiness is not falsely claimed when blockers remain.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Result marked partial: PHP unavailable, remote GitHub repo unresolved by gh, static forms are prototype-only, and WordPress contact/form/mail path is absent.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Target repos are left read-only/no commits/deploys.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Only /tmp script artifacts and end-to-end-loop eval log were written; tdrrecherche git status remained clean before eval. No deploy/merge/admin/release action executed.

learning_candidates.text: Even with gh authenticated as tiddeman83, the exact slugs bloonbladmaker/tdrrecherche/Schoolanalyse may not resolve via gh repo view; report slug/access blocker and use local clone evidence only when present.
learning_candidates.reason: Verified recurring DevBoss access blocker; privacy-safe.

learning_candidates.text: tdrrecherche read-only eval: HTML/asset audit + node --check + local http.server smoke can validate static sampler while PHP/WordPress runtime is unavailable.
learning_candidates.reason: Reusable safe eval pattern for this target repo class.

learning_candidates.text: tdrrecherche static forms remain prototype-only when action is empty/# or WordPress contact/mail/nonce path is absent; do not claim production readiness.
learning_candidates.reason: Observed acceptance blocker and already aligned with prior readiness lessons.

copilot_findings.summary: gh copilot wrapper help returned rc 0. No Copilot code review was run because this was a read-only eval with no target diff to review and wrapper invocation may install/download when deeper commands are used.

notes: Performance/quality/end-result observation: end-to-end-loop kept the eval safe and evidence-based, but agenda-first + repeated checks are tool-call heavy. Visible token counts were not exposed by this cron environment; tool-use evidence is the command/log list above.
